case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. VANESSA SEPULVEDA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEPULVEDA, VANESSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 46 DAKOTA ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, -ORIGINAL LEASE SUBMITTED STAMPED JUDGMENT RENDERED HEREON.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT SEPULVEDA, VANESSA DOES 1-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ON DEFENDANT SEPULVEDA, VANESSA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JUL-20-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEPULVEDA, VANESSA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $211.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SEPULVEDA, VANESSA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $5.13 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SEPULVEDA, VANESSA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SEPULVEDA, VANESSA
